vocab.example_en: Good day to you, Mr. Director.

sentences.sl: Živjo, kako si danes?

sentences.sl: Hej, zdravo! Kaj je novega?

sentences.sl: Čao, lep pozdrav vsem!
sentences.en: Ciao, kind regards to everyone!

vocab.example_en: Goodbye, have a nice rest of the day.

sentences.sl: Nasvidenje, se vidimo jutri!

sentences.sl: Dobro jutro! Lep dan vam želim.

sentences.sl: Dober večer, lahko noč.

sentences.sl: Adijo, srečno in zbogom!
sentences.en: Bye, good luck and farewell!

vocab.example_en: Excuse me, where is the station?

vocab.example: Niti ne vem, niti me ne zanima.

sentences.sl: Hvala lepa, zelo ste prijazni.
sentences.en: Thank you very much, you are very kind.

sentences.sl: Seveda, izvolite!

sentences.sl: Odlično, danes je lep dan.
sentences.en: Excellent, today is a nice day.

vocab.example_en: Three apples are on the table.

sentences.sl: Ob osmih začnemo, ob šestih končamo.

vocab.example: Štirideset ur je en teden dela.

vocab.example_en: A thousand people came to the concert.

sentences.sl: Šestdeset minut je ena ura.
sentences.en: Sixty minutes is one hour.

sentences.sl: Sto evrov za eno noč v hotelu.
sentences.en: A hundred euros for one night in a hotel.

sentences.sl: Tisoč metrov je en kilometer.
sentences.en: A thousand meters is one kilometer.

sentences.sl: Trideset plus štirideset je sedemdeset.
sentences.en: Thirty plus forty is seventy.

vocab.example: Deset deljeno z dva je pet.
vocab.example_en: Ten divided by two is five.

vocab.example: Dva plus dva je enako štiri.

sentences.sl: Dva plus tri je enako pet.
sentences.en: Two plus three equals five.

sentences.sl: Prvi, drugi, tretji - tako štejemo.
sentences.en: First, second, third - that's how we count.

sentences.sl: Deset deljeno z dva je pet.
sentences.en: Ten divided by two is five.

sentences.sl: Šest krat osem minus dva je šestinštirideset.
sentences.en: Six times eight minus two is forty-six.

vocab.example_en: The pink dress is in the window.

vocab.example_en: The sun shines over the mountain.

vocab.example_en: I like to cook for the family.

sentences.sl: Režem zelenjavo in mešam juho.

sentences.sl: Natoči vodo v kozarec.
sentences.en: Pour water into the glass.

sentences.sl: Sin in hči sta naša otroka.

vocab.example_en: The neighbor has a nice house.

vocab.example: On je poročen že deset let.

sentences.sl: Zaročenec in zaročenka se bosta kmalu poročila.

sentences.en: Love and happiness are in our family.

vocab.example_en: The dog barks at the cat.

sentences.sl: Riba plava, ptica pa leti.

sentences.sl: Zajec in hrček sta majhna.

sentences.sl: Želva je počasna, kača pa hitra.

sentences.sl: Petelin budi kmeta, raca pa plava.

sentences.sl: Kavč in postelja sta udobna.

sentences.sl: Oblačila so v omari ali predalniku.

sentences.sl: Ogledalo je nad polico.
sentences.en: The mirror is above the shelf.

vocab.example_en: The fence is around the garden.

sentences.sl: Streha je rdeča, stene pa bele.
sentences.en: The roof is red, and the walls are white.

sentences.sl: Ograja je okrog vrta.

vocab.example_en: I clean the house on Saturdays.

I vacuum the carpet in the living room.

I need to fix the door.

sentences.sl: Ob sobotah čistim, pometam in sesam.
sentences.en: On Saturdays I clean, sweep, and vacuum.

sentences.sl: Po praženju pomivam posodo.

sentences.sl: Selimo se, gradijo nam novo hišo.

sentences.sl: Moram popraviti vrata in okno.
sentences.en: I need to fix the door and window.

vocab.example_en: In the morning I drink coffee.
At noon I go to lunch.
In the afternoon I have free time.
In the evening I watch TV.

sentences.sl: Zjutraj pijem kavo, zvečer pa čaj.
sentences.en: In the morning I drink coffee, in the evening tea.

sentences.sl: Koliko je ura? Je opoldne.
sentences.en: What time is it? It's noon.

sentences.sl: Popoldne imam prosto, ponoči pa spim.
sentences.en: In the afternoon I have free time, at night I sleep.

sentences.sl: Počakaj eno minuto, samo sekundo!
sentences.en: Wait one minute, just a second!

vocab.example_en: On Monday I go to work.

On Saturday we go on a trip.

sentences.sl: Od ponedeljka do petka delam.
sentences.en: I work from Monday to Friday.

sentences.sl: Sobota in nedelja sta vikend.
sentences.en: Saturday and Sunday are the weekend.

sentences.sl: Januar in februar sta hladna meseca.
sentences.en: January and February are cold months.

sentences.sl: Sreda in četrtek sta sredi tedna.
sentences.en: Wednesday and Thursday are in the middle of the week.

vocab.example_en: June is the beginning of summer.

sentences.sl: Pomlad je v aprilu in maju.
sentences.en: Spring is in April and May.

sentences.sl: Poletje je v juniju, juliju in avgustu.
sentences.en: Summer is in June, July, and August.

sentences.sl: Jesen se začne v septembru.
sentences.en: Autumn begins in September.

sentences.sl: Pozimi sneži, poleti pa je vroče.
sentences.en: In winter it snows, in summer it's hot.

vocab.example_en: Tomorrow I go on a trip.

sentences.sl: Danes je lep dan, jutri pa bo deževalo.
sentences.en: Today is a nice day, but tomorrow it will rain.

sentences.sl: Včeraj sem šel pozno spat, zdaj sem zaspan.
sentences.en: Yesterday I went to bed late, now I'm sleepy.

sentences.sl: Zgodaj vstajam, nikoli ne zamudim.
sentences.en: I get up early, I never run late.

sentences.sl: Vedno pijem kavo, včasih pa čaj.
sentences.en: I always drink coffee, sometimes tea.

sentences.sl: Kmalu bo poletje.
sentences.en: Soon it will be summer.
